untranslatable_reason: Adam & Eve Double Bottom is a visual chart pattern requiring identification of two distinct bottom formations and their structural properties (valleys, peaks, relative depths). This cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios). Pattern recognition requires candlestick pattern detection or custom shape analysis not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted a simplified approximation using downtrend detection and upward breakout via moving average crossover, but this does not capture the specific two-bottom formation structure or the statistical edge (78% success rate in bull markets) documented by Bulkowski. For accurate implementation, a dedicated chart pattern recognition engine or custom candlestick pattern library would be required.
